etymology: Ruth = companion; Rae = ray of light
wordplay_note: A companion who offers a ray of hope then betrays
card_description: Ruth Rae (meaning "Ruth = companion; Rae = ray of light") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Flow My Tears the Policeman Said*. Record store owner who takes in Taverner then informs on him. Name note: A companion who offers a ray of hope then betrays. Betrayal as survival mechanism under totalitarianism. First appears in *Flow My Tears the Policeman Said*.
first_work: Flow My Tears the Policeman Said
work_list: Flow My Tears the Policeman Said
